heading: Protection of services and recreational opportunities
label: 460ffff–5 Protection of services and recreational opportunities

children.heading: Effect of subchapter
children.label: a Effect of subchapter
children.text: Nothing in this subchapter limits commercial services for existing or historic recreation uses, as authorized by the permit process of the Bureau of Land Management.

children.heading: Guided recreational opportunities
children.label: b Guided recreational opportunities
children.text: Commercial permits to exercise guided recreational opportunities for the public that are authorized as of , may continue to be authorized.March 12, 2019
